sectiondef.header: Bit-width masks used by I3C helper logic.

description.para: These masks carve out the low N bits of a value.
Used by the folded-XOR odd-parity helper (XI3cPsx_OddParity7) and the dynamic-address encoding in XI3cPsx_SetDynamicAddr.

briefdescription.para: Mask for the 7-bit I3C dynamic address field (values 0x00..0x7F)
BIT 8 - Dynamic Address Assigned - only in slave mode.
BIT 13 - Role of the controller changes from being a Master to Slave or vice versa.
BIT 15 - Bus Reset Pattern Generation Done.

parameterdescription.para: contains the base address of the device.
contains the offset from the 1st register of the device to select the specific register.

simplesect.para: The value read from the register.
C-Style signature: u32 XI3Psxl_ReadReg(u32 BaseAddress. int RegOffset)

parameterdescription.para: contains the base address of the device.
contains the offset from the 1st register of the device to select the specific register.
is the value to be written to the register.

simplesect.para: C-Style signature: void XI3cPsx_WriteReg(u32 BaseAddress, int RegOffset, u32 RegisterValue)

memberdef.name: XI3cPsx_EnableInterrupts
memberdef.initializer: XI3cPsx_WriteReg((BaseAddress), XI3CPSX_INTR_STATUS_EN, \ ((XI3cPsx_ReadReg(BaseAddress, XI3CPSX_INTR_STATUS_EN))| \ (IntrMask))); \ XI3cPsx_WriteReg((BaseAddress), XI3CPSX_INTR_SIGNAL_EN, \ ((XI3cPsx_ReadReg(BaseAddress, XI3CPSX_INTR_SIGNAL_EN))| \ (IntrMask)))

parameterdescription.para: address of the XI3cPsx core instance.

simplesect.para: C-style signature: u16 XI3cPsx_EnableInterrupts(XI3cPsx *InstancePtr, u32 IntrMask)

memberdef.name: XI3cPsx_DisableInterrupts
memberdef.initializer: XI3cPsx_WriteReg((BaseAddress), XI3CPSX_INTR_STATUS_EN, \ ((XI3cPsx_ReadReg(BaseAddress, XI3CPSX_INTR_STATUS_EN))\ & ~(IntrMask))); \ XI3cPsx_WriteReg((BaseAddress), XI3CPSX_INTR_SIGNAL_EN, \ ((XI3cPsx_ReadReg(BaseAddress, XI3CPSX_INTR_SIGNAL_EN))\ & ~(IntrMask)))

parameterdescription.para: address of the XI3cPsx core instance.

simplesect.para: C-style signature: u16 XI3cPsx_DisableInterrupts(XI3cPsx *InstancePtr, u32 IntrMask)

briefdescription.para: Bit position of the odd-parity bit within the 8-bit encoded I3C dynamic address.

detaileddescription.para: The encoded dynamic address is an 8-bit field: bit[7] is the odd parity of the 7-bit dynamic address (bits[6:0]), i.e. parity = ~XOR(addr[6:0]). This matches the MIPI I3C bus format and the DEV_ADDR_TABLE_LOC*.DEV_DYNAMIC_ADDR[23:16] field layout, where bit[23] (= bit[7] of the 8-bit field) is the parity bit.
